name: Clara
desc: A vagrant girl who lives with robots.\nShe is introverted, gentle, and has a pure heart.\nShe wishes for all Underworlders to become a family.

1.name: A Tall Figure
1.desc: Using Skill will not remove Marks of Counter on the enemy.

2.name: A Tight Embrace
2.desc: After using the Ultimate, ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Cold Steel Armor
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Family's Warmth
4.desc: After Clara is hit, the DMG taken by Clara is reduced by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect lasts until the start of her next turn.

5.name: A Small Promise
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Long Company
6.desc: After other allies are attacked, Svarog also has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to trigger a <u>Counter</u> on the attacker and mark them with a "Mark of Counter." When using Ultimate, the number of Enhanced Counters increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

10000003.name: Counter
10000003.desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

110701.name: I Want to Help
110701.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Clara's ATK to one designated enemy.
110701.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

110702.name: Svarog Watches Over You
110702.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Clara's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Clara's ATK to enemies marked by Svarog with a Mark of Counter.\nAll Marks of Counter will be removed after this Skill is used.
110702.simple_desc: Deals Physical DMG to all enemies. <color=#f29e38ff>Additionally deals Physical DMG</color> to targets with Marks of Counter.

110703.name: Promise, <unbreak>Not Command</unbreak>
110703.desc: After Clara uses Ultimate, DMG dealt to her is reduced by an extra <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, and she has greatly increased chances of being attacked by enemies for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nIn addition, Svarog's <u>Counter</u> is enhanced. When an ally is attacked, Svarog immediately launches a <u>Counter</u>, and its DMG multiplier against the enemy increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Enemies adjacent to it take <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of the DMG dealt to the primary target enemy. Enhanced <u>Counter(s)</u> can take effect <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s).
110703.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Reduces DMG received</color>, increases chance to be attacked by enemies, and enhances <u>Counters</u>.

10000003.name: Counter
10000003.desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

110704.name: Because We're Family
110704.desc: Under the protection of Svarog, DMG taken by Clara when hit by enemy attacks is reduced by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. Svarog will mark enemies who attack Clara with his Mark of Counter and retaliate with a <u>Counter</u>, dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Clara's ATK.
110704.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>DMG received from enemy attacks is reduced</color>. Enemies who attack Clara will be marked with a Mark of Counter and <color=#f29e38ff>met with Svarog's <u>Counter</u></color>, dealing Physical DMG.

10000003.name: Counter
10000003.desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

110706.name: Attack
110706.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110707.name: A Small Price for Victory
110707.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, the chance Clara will be attacked by enemies increases for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110707.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, this character's chance of being attacked by enemies increases.

1.point_desc: When attacked, this unit has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to dispel 1 <u>debuff</u> placed on them.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

1.point_desc: Increases the chance to resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

1.point_desc: Increases DMG dealt by Svarog's <u>Counter</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000003.name: Counter
10000003.desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.
